author: potuz
content: One thing we noticed with <@363800010518822915> is that if we sync without ever requesting by batch the Payloads we won't be verifying the Payloads signatures. We could verify them in batches later

author: potuz
content: But honestly do we really even need to ever request Payloads by batch? A syncing client only needs the last envelope and sync over gossip. I honestly believe we will be safe removing all Payload RPC on the CL side

author: potuz
content: And we can optimistically sync blocks on top of unknown Payloads immediately

author: potuz
content: I'll raise this on ACD if there's one this week
